Guuguyni Empire Consulate

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3304-01-19 · 2 mentions

Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3304-01-26
Aisling Duval Campaign Concludes
Princess Aisling Duval's anti-slavery campaign in the Guuguyni system has concluded successfully. Hundreds of independent combat pilots neutralized slave traders operating in the region. Princess Duval expressed gratitude, noting that hundreds of people were saved from a life of misery.
3304-01-19
Eliminating Slavers in Guuguyni
Princess Aisling Duval has announced plans to fund a peacekeeping operation in the Guuguyni system to neutralize an illegal slave-trading ring. She described illegal slavery as an abhorrent practice that negates victims' fundamental human rights.
